bounty_pools.description: Goblin scouts have been seen near the trade road. Eliminate them before they report back to Kazer-Dun.
Restless dead have been spotted in the swamps around Aberdeen. Put them to rest.
Giant spiders have infested the old mine tunnels. Clear them out.
A pack of wolves is threatening what little livestock Aberdeen has left.
Deliver an urgent message to the next settlement.

notes: Aberdeen bounties focus on goblin threats (Kazer-Dun connection), undead in the swamps, and survival-related tasks. Lower variety due to the town's crisis state.
